title: Kozhu Kozhu Lyrics Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Vijay Prakash, Priya Hemesh
Song: Kozhu Kozhu
Music : C. Sathya
Lyrics: Pa Vijay
Movie: Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru		 .
Lyrics in Thanglish
Exact translation of tamil words

Kozhu kozhu porandhavaley
mozhu mozhunu valandhavaley
muzhusa nee kedaicha enna seiven

Kulu kulunu siripavaley
gilu gilunu irupavaley
sogusa nee kidacha enna seiven
kanna kuli inikka naan appadiye saapuduven
neju kuli neratha naa appadiye alliduven

Nee thee thee, thoonda nee
ennthaan alliko
vazhiko ichiko pichiko vachiko

Nee nee nee jill raani
mellathaan mennuko
munnuko pinnuko ennayum kattiko

nee ennako naan unako
neradi kiruko
un kiruko meliruko
anjadi thalliko

Hey appadi ippadi thaan
enna kattika muttikathaan
mella kaikoduthaan kaikoduthaan
manasayum keduthaan

Kaa kaa kaa nee aavakka
onnumey othukaa thathaka
puthaka pithaka pithaka

Tha thaa thaa kanpaarthu thaa
kandippa kandippa kannathil
kandippa muthathil vanjippaa

Aithalakka nee ennaku nenjila sulukka
thummalukkaa unkanakkaa pogudhu erakka
adi ennadi ennadiyo
rendu kannadi kannadiyo
adhu meen kadiyo
thaen kadiyo
veesuraa vediyo

Kozhu kozhu porandhavaley
mozhu mozhunu valandhavaley
muzhusa nee kedaicha enna seiven

kanna kuli inikka
naan appadiye appadiyesaapuduven
neju kuli neratha
naa appadiye appadiye alliduvenEnglish Translation

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kozhu Kozhu?

The song is a lively and energetic track that celebrates joy and happiness.

Who are the singers of Kozhu Kozhu?

The song is sung by Priya Himesh and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru?

The music was composed by Sathya C.

When was Kozhu Kozhu released?

The song was released in 2013.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in a celebratory scene, adding to the festive atmosphere of the film.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kozhu Kozhu is a peppy and energetic song from the movie Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru. Sung by Priya Himesh and Vijay Prakash, the track is a celebration of joy and happiness, perfectly suited for party and festive occasions. The lively beats and catchy lyrics make it a favorite among fans of upbeat Tamil music. The song captures the essence of fun and excitement, making it an ideal choice for any celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kozhu Kozhu from Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration. With the dynamic vocals of Priya Himesh and Vijay Prakash, combined with Sathya C's lively composition, this song is a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits. Dive into this peppy number and experience the joy and excitement it brings!
stanzaMeanings: Chubby one, you were born chubby and grew up round. If I get you completely, what will I do?

The one who laughs sweetly, the one who is lively, if I get you beautifully, what will I do? When the sugar syrup is sweet, I will eat it just like that. When the heart is full, I will hug you just like that.
You are like fire, you tease me. Come close, hold me, keep me.
You, you, you, cool queen, slowly come forward, backward, and tie me up too.
You are for me, I am for you. I am right here, above you, don't be afraid, push me away.
Hey, like this, like that, you tied me up, slowly gave your hand, gave your hand, and broke my heart.
Chubby one, you were born chubby and grew up round. If I get you completely, what will I do?
When the sugar syrup is sweet, I will eat it just like that. When the heart is full, I will hug you just like that.
